// NOTE: The gm-cro-agent plugin binds ONE hosted connector: the GrowthMastery CRO Engine over HTTP MCP with interactive OAuth. There are NO tokens in this file — on first use Claude runs the OAuth consent flow against GrowthMastery's authorization server (discovered from /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource) and stores the grant itself. The Intelligence Engine executes the rubric server-side; the thin skills and commands in this plugin only CALL the connector — nothing rubric-bearing ever lands on your machine (go-live plan sections 0 and 1).
